summary: Phase H.2 (Policy Intelligence & Inspection Readiness) — full backend + frontend E2E verified. All 11 pytest cases PASS. Frontend: manager sees dashboard widget + deep-link works + PI page renders fully + PDF downloads work from both widget and PI page. Staff RBAC enforced at both API (403) and UI (friendly blocked banner). Sector switching to adult correctly uses sector=adult on both endpoints with no children leakage.
critical_code_review_comments: PolicyIntelligence.jsx at 415 lines is approaching the 700-line guideline ceiling but remains acceptable; if more pillars/blocks are added consider splitting headline + KPIs + tables into sub-components.
InspectionReadyWidget swallows fetch errors silently (catch{}). Acceptable for a non-critical widget, but consider logging non-403 errors to console for debuggability.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded demo data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase H.2 endpoints in /app/backend/policy_routes.py: GET /api/policy-intelligence/dashboard, GET /api/inspection-readiness/score, GET /api/inspection-readiness/evidence-pack.pdf — all sector-partitioned (children/adult), manager+ only. Frontend: /policy-intelligence page (PolicyIntelligence.jsx) and InspectionReadyWidget on Dashboard. Manager login first lands on /welcome (sector picker) — for tests, click 'Enter workspace' (Children's = first card, Adult = second card) before login. Login uses data-testid login-email-input/login-password-input.
verified_flows: Manager login -> Dashboard shows InspectionReadyWidget (score 46/100 RED, 5 pillars, Open intelligence link, Evidence pack button)
Click 'Open intelligence' deep-links to /policy-intelligence and renders policy-intelligence-page

PI page shows KPI tiles (29/100 policy compliance, 0 induction, 0 governance, 100 SPF, 100 SCR), policy_compliance block (34 active, 10 complete, 0 overdue), by-role table (Manager/Senior/Staff), staff needing attention list, Most failed policies top 10 with fail rates, Generate Inspection Evidence Pack button
Widget Evidence pack download produces 13154-byte inspection-evidence-pack-children.pdf
PI page Generate Inspection Evidence Pack download produces 13155-byte inspection-evidence-pack-children.pdf
Staff login -> InspectionReadyWidget hidden on dashboard (component returns null since isManagerOrAbove=false)
Staff direct nav to /policy-intelligence -> friendly 'Manager+ only — intelligence is restricted.' banner (data-testid=policy-intel-blocked); no crash
Staff hitting /api/policy-intelligence/dashboard and /api/inspection-readiness/score returns 403 (confirmed via console)

Manager in Adult workspace -> /policy-intelligence calls dashboard?sector=adult AND score?sector=adult (4 captured requests); page header shows 'Adult Services'; figures distinct (60/100 readiness vs 46 in children, Statement of Purpose · Adult Services in most failed)
